meaning: n.一种纸牌戏(由二至四人玩)
examples: In late 1943, the allies were fighting their way up from southern Italy towards Rome when they encountered fierce resistance around Monte Cassino.
In 1944, the monastery at Monte Cassino in Italy was bombed by Allied aircraft.
Its battle honours include Blenheim, Talavera, Waterloo, Aliwal, Ypres, Fondouk, Cassino and more recently the Gulf, 1991.
This ragtag army mustered in Persia, trained in Palestine and fought notably at Monte Cassino in Italy.
